name: Death by Chocolate
recipeIngredient: 8 Chocolate Covered Toffee Bars (Skor or Heath, 1.4 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven according to brownie package directions.
2. Bake the brownies as directed on the package; allow them to cool completely.
3. Prepare the chocolate mousse following the package instructions.
4. Break the candy bars into small pieces using a food processor or by gently tapping with a hammer.
5. In a large glass bowl or trifle dish, place half of the cooled brownies at the bottom.
6. Cover the brownies with half of the prepared chocolate mousse.
7. Add half of the broken candy bars on top of the mousse.
8. Spread half of the whipped topping over the candy bars.
9. Repeat layers with the remaining ingredients: the rest of the chocolate mousse, the rest of the candy bars, and the remaining whipped topping.
10. Serve immediately or refrigerate until ready to serve.
Yield: Feeds up to 24 (or one serious Chocoholic!)
